violations.text: The establishment does not have a written procedure for cleaning vomit and diarrhea. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/19/2025

Raw animal foods (eggs) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (cheese, deli meats) in the reach-in refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/19/2025
At time of inspection, deli meats and cheese were observed with date mark of 2/6 which exceeds the 7 days. New Violation. Correct By: 03/05/2025

Inspector observed the following to be in poor repair: 1. The faucet at the mop sink was observed being held together with tape. 2. Hot water handle at 3 bay sink was not operable. Plumbing systems to be maintained in good repair and proper adjustment. New Violation. Correct By: 03/05/2025
